# Collision: sink already has a func with the same name.
# Expect: non-zero exit, stderr identifies the sink and declaration, files unchanged.
cp a.go a_before.go
cp b.go b_before.go
! exec sflit -source a.go -sink b.go -regex '^Foo' -move
stderr 'cannot write to b.go: declaration Foo already exists in sink'
cmp a.go a_before.go
cmp b.go b_before.go

-- a.go --
package p

func Foo() {}
-- b.go --
package p

func Foo() {}
